=== lineage.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and His Band

recorded live at the:-

Finger Lakes Performing Arts Center
Canandaigua
New York

28 June 1988
 
SOURCE : AUD recording
LINEAGE : Audio cdr > (EAC) wav > (mkwACT) shn
SOUND : good

D1 42:24
D2 37:29

This was received as shn files from a trading group.
The files are as received, I have added wave file checksums,
dylanvine artwork, and changed the filenames.

Enjoy
TheOldToaD
February 2005
===================
===================
===================
=== setlist.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and His Band

recorded live at the:-

Finger Lakes Performing Arts Center
Canandaigua
New York

28 June 1988
 
unknown audience recording (low generation)

disc one 42:24

01	Subterranean Homesick Blues
02	I Want You
03	Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
04	You're A Big Girl Now
05	Maggie's Farm
06	Shelter From The Storm
07	Give My Love To Rose (Johnny Cash)
08	A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall

disc two 37:29

01	San Francisco Bay Blues (Jesse Fuller)
02	Boots Of Spanish Leather
03	Silvio (Bob Dylan & Robert Hunter)
04	In The Garden
05	Like A Rolling Stone
06	The Times They Are A-Changin'
07	All Along The Watchtower
08	Everybody's Movin' (Glen Trout)


Concert # 14 of The Never-Ending Tour.
Concert # 14 of the Interstate 88 Tour, part 1: Summer Tour of North America.
Concert # 14 with the first Never-Ending Tour Band

Band members

Bob Dylan		vocal, guitar & harp
G. E. Smith		guitar
Kenny Aaronson		bass
Christopher Parker	drums
